Get completed exam counts by examType for current student's class. Returns distinct counts of Official and Practice exams where status == 'Completed'.

query.description: Filter by exam type: 'all', 'Official', 'Practice', or 'Exam Repository'

request.description: Get subject-wise average percentage and grade for current student's class. Returns average percentage and grade for each subject based on completed exams. Filter by examType (all, Official, Practice, Exam Repository).

Get last 3 graded results for the authenticated student. Returns examTitle, examType, subject, percentage, grade, and isFirstTime badge. Only includes results where gradingStatus === 'Completed' (teacher has graded).

query.description: Filter by exam type (Official, Practice, Exam Repository)
Filter by exam status (Draft, Unpublished, Published, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled)

body.raw:
{
  "examTitle": "Mathematics Final Exam",
  "description": "End term mathematics examination",
  "examType": "Official",
  "totalMarks": 50,
  "passingMarks": 25,
  "maxAttempts": 1,
  "allowedAttempts": 1,
  "durationInMinutes": 60,
  "startOn": "2025-10-26T09:00:00.000Z",
  "endOn": "2025-10-27T18:00:00.000Z",
  "classId": "{{classId}}",
  "subjectId": "{{subjectId}}",
  "batchId": "{{batchId}}",
  "exam_questions": [
    {
      "questionNumber": 1,
      "questionType": "MCQs",
      "questionText": "What is 2 + 2?",
      "marks": 10,
      "difficulty": "Easy",
      "options": [
        {"text": "3", "isCorrect": false},
        {"text": "4", "isCorrect": true},
        {"text": "5", "isCorrect": false}
      ],
      "correctAnswer": "4"
    },
    {
      "questionNumber": 2,
      "questionType": "True/False",
      "questionText": "Is 5 greater than 3?",
      "marks": 10,
      "difficulty": "Easy",
      "correctAnswer": "True"
    },
    {
      "questionNumber": 3,
      "questionType": "Short Answers",
      "questionText": "What is the capital of Pakistan?",
      "marks": 10,
      "difficulty": "Easy",
      "correctAnswer": "Islamabad"
    },
    {
      "questionNumber": 4,
      "questionType": "Fill in the Blanks",
      "questionText": "The sun rises in the ___",
      "marks": 10,
      "difficulty": "Easy",
      "correctAnswer": "east"
    },
    {
      "questionNumber": 5,
      "questionType": "Long Answers",
      "questionText": "Explain the Pythagorean theorem with an example.",
      "marks": 10,
      "difficulty": "Medium",
      "correctAnswer": "a² + b² = c²"
    }
  ],
  "exam_students": [
    {
      "studentId": "{{studentId}}",
      "classId": "{{classId}}",
      "subjectId": "{{subjectId}}",
      "batchId": "{{batchId}}"
    }
  ]
}

body.raw:
{
  "attemptId": "{{attemptId}}",
  "studentId": "{{studentId}}",
  "studentName": "Student",
  "examId": "{{examId}}",
  "examTitle": "Exam Title",
  "totalMarks": 150,
  "submittedAt": "2025-01-03T13:43:41.279Z",
  "timeTaken": 63,
  "questionsGraded": 0,
  "questionsPending": 5,
  "questions": [
    {
      "questionId": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "questionNumber": 1,
      "questionType": "MCQs",
      "questionText": "What is the primary function of mitochondria?",
      "marks": 25,
      "correctAnswer": "A",
      "studentAnswer": "A",
      "marksObtained": 0
    },
    {
      "questionId": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439012",
      "questionNumber": 2,
      "questionType": "True/False",
      "questionText": "DNA is found only in the nucleus.",
      "marks": 10,
      "correctAnswer": "False",
      "studentAnswer": "False",
      "marksObtained": 0
    },
    {
      "questionId": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439013",
      "questionNumber": 3,
      "questionType": "Short Answers",
      "questionText": "Explain the difference between mitosis and meiosis.",
      "marks": 30,
      "correctAnswer": "Mitosis creates two identical cells, meiosis creates four genetically different cells.",
      "studentAnswer": "Mitosis makes two identical cells for growth. Meiosis makes four different cells for reproduction. Meiosis has two divisions.",
      "marksObtained": 0
    },
    {
      "questionId": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439014",
      "questionNumber": 4,
      "questionType": "Long Answers",
      "questionText": "Describe the process of protein synthesis in detail, including transcription and translation.",
      "marks": 55,
      "correctAnswer": "Protein synthesis involves transcription (DNA to mRNA) and translation (mRNA to protein).",
      "studentAnswer": "Protein synthesis happens in two steps. First, DNA is copied into mRNA in the nucleus through transcription. Then mRNA goes to the ribosome where it's read and amino acids are assembled into a protein. This is called translation.",
      "marksObtained": 0
    },
    {
      "questionId": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439015",
      "questionNumber": 5,
      "questionType": "Fill in the Blanks",
      "questionText": "The process by which plants make food is called ____.",
      "marks": 30,
      "correctAnswer": "photosynthesis",
      "studentAnswer": "photosynthesis",
      "marksObtained": 0
    }
  ]
}
